title: Chewy Turkish Delight with Mushroom Tart
description: A sweet and savory combination of chewy Turkish Delight and a flavorful mushroom tart.
instructions: Roll out the mushroom tart crust and place on a baking sheet.
In a pan, heat olive oil over medium heat. Add sliced mushrooms and cook until tender.
Add minced garlic and dried thyme to the pan and cook for 1 minute.
Brush the edges of the tart crust with olive oil.
Arrange the cooked mushroom mixture on top of the tart crust.
Bake the tart in the preheated oven for 20-25 minutes, or until golden brown.
While the tart is baking, mix chopped Turkish Delight with a pinch of salt.
Remove the tart from the oven and let it cool for 5 minutes.
Sprinkle the Turkish Delight mixture over the top of the tart.
Return the tart to the oven and bake for an additional 5-7 minutes, or until the Turkish Delight is caramelized.
Remove the tart from the oven and let it cool completely before serving.
